actions.name: Industrimotor (Starmobile)
actions.description:
Effect: As part of an Exploration or Camp Action, the user can consume a specific type of [Fuel], changing their Forme, and setting a filled Fuel Clock on themselves for 5 Spans. The user remains in the Forme until the Fuel Clock is emptied. The Fuel Clock ticks down 1 Span if:

  1. The user enters Combat at least once during a Daytime Span.
  2. Five Daytime Spans pass.
The user can also tick the Fuel Clock down 5 Spans as an Exploration or Camp Action.

The [Fuel] items, and the specific Forme they add are as follows:

  • Blazing Fuel: Schedar Starmobile (Speed Boost, Blazing Torque, Steel/Fire Type)
  • Combat Fuel: Caph Starmobile (Stamina, Combat Torque. Steel/Fighting Type)
  • Magical Fuel: Ruchbah Starmobile (Misty Surge, Magical Torque, Steel/Fairy Type)
  • Noxious Fuel: Navi Starmobile (Pollution, Noxious Torque, Steel/Poison Type)
  • Wicked Fuel: Segin Starmobile (Reckless, Wicked Torque, Steel/Dark Type)

actions.name: Industrimotor (Car)
actions.description:
Effect: As part of a Project or GM Permission, the user may enter a Forme identical to an automobile. Each car Forme radically changes the user’s physical properties, and makes the user a [Vehicle], rather than an owned creature.

Further guidance to be determined following the writing of vehicle rules.

system.description: Effect: The user has the capability to become specific types of motor vehicles, some being special Formes akin to a [Phenomenon], others just outright being realistic vehicles like automobiles, boats, planes, etc. This Ability’s sub-Actions detail specific the types of vehicles the user can become, and what specific changes those include.
